output.answer:
<answer>
The location of Washington Union Station in Washington DC is at coordinates 38.897310° N, 77.006260° W (geographic coordinates: POINT(-77.006260 38.897310)).
</answer>
output.formatted:
<answer>
The location of Washington Union Station in Washington DC is at coordinates 38.897310° N, 77.006260° W (geographic coordinates: POINT(-77.006260 38.897310)).
</answer>

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?coordinate WHERE {
  ?station rdfs:label "Washington Union Station" @en .
  ?station wdt:P625 ?coordinate .
}
```

Execution result:
Got 1 row and 1 column:
| coordinate                                   |
| -------------------------------------------- |
| POINT(-77.006260 38.897310) (geo:wktLiteral) |

- Explain your thought process before and after each step and function call.
